Projects.name: Ourkanban
Projects.description: Lightweight, high-performance, real-time shareable Kanban board built for instant collaboration. Generate a board, save the code and get instant access anytime.
Projects.tech: Built on Next.js using React, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. Uses Supabase as the database.

Projects.name: Pixel-doku
Projects.description: Artistic, interactive, browser-based Sudoku game which uses colors instead of numbers. Four difficulty levels, with added artificial assymetry for highest difficulty.
Projects.tech: Built on Next.js using React, TypeScript and Tailwind CSS.

Projects.name: PositiveMindCare
Projects.description: My work included several dynamic and interactive core components for the website CMS, admin/user portal and backend APIs.
Projects.tech: Uses Next.js and Payload CMS for the website; React, Vite and TanStack Router for the portal; Hono and Prisma for the backend. Deployed on AWS using SST.

Projects.name: MoSJE Portal
Projects.description: Made dynamic and interactive dashboards, displaying large datasets in easy-to-understand charts and graphs. Processed huge amounts of data into manageable information.
Projects.tech: Uses React, Nestjs, Prisma and MongoDB.
